quicksight.topic.topicnumericequalityfil: A filter that filters topics based on the value of a numeric field. The filter includes only topics whose numeric field value matches the specified value.

quicksight.topic.topicnumericequalityfil.Description: An aggregation function that specifies how to calculate the value of a numeric field for a topic. Valid values for this structure are `NO_AGGREGATION`, `SUM`, `AVERAGE`, `COUNT`, `DISTINCT_COUNT`, `MAX`, `MEDIAN`, `MIN`, `STDEV`, `STDEVP`, `VAR`, and `VARP`.
quicksight.topic.topicnumericequalityfil.Allowed values: AVERAGE | COUNT | DISTINCT_COUNT | MAX | MEDIAN | MIN | NO_AGGREGATION | STDEV | STDEVP | SUM | VAR | VARP

quicksight.topic.topicnumericequalityfil.Description: The constant used in a numeric equality filter.
